content.text: In one paragraph, summarize what Habitat is based on everything you know about it from Canerden's projects and your skills.

messages.content: I will read the `README.md` and `CLAUDE.md` to gather more context about Habitat within this project.

toolCalls.name: read_file

response.output:
# agent-bridge

To install dependencies:

```bash
bun install
```

To run:

```bash
bun run index.ts
```

This project was created using `bun init` in bun v1.3.11. [Bun](https://bun.com) is a fast all-in-one JavaScript runtime.

toolCalls.description: Reads and returns the content of a specified file. If the file is large, the content will be truncated. The tool's response will clearly indicate if truncation has occurred and will provide details on how to read more of the file using the 'start_line' and 'end_line' parameters. Handles text, images (PNG, JPG, GIF, WEBP, SVG, BMP), audio files (MP3, WAV, AIFF, AAC, OGG, FLAC), and PDF files. For text files, it can read specific line ranges.

toolCalls.name: read_file
toolCalls.description: Reads and returns the content of a specified file. If the file is large, the content will be truncated. The tool's response will clearly indicate if truncation has occurred and will provide details on how to read more of the file using the 'start_line' and 'end_line' parameters. Handles text, images (PNG, JPG, GIF, WEBP, SVG, BMP), audio files (MP3, WAV, AIFF, AAC, OGG, FLAC), and PDF files. For text files, it can read specific line ranges.

messages.content: Habitat is a high-velocity startup acceleration framework designed to help founders rapidly transform a single idea into a launched and validated product through time-boxed, structured execution. It centers on the "5-hour Habitat Prototype Sprint," a disciplined methodology for building functional MVPs in a single evening, supported by a comprehensive suite of strategic tools covering everything from lean scoping and market validation to customer acquisition and investor pitching. By combining aggressive speed with silicon-valley-grade frameworks for growth and product-market fit, Habitat provides a complete operational playbook for founders to navigate the earliest stages of venture building with maximum efficiency and clarity.
